title: phyllanthus millei
intro: Phyllanthus millei, a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, is also known as the West Indian gooseberry or Amla. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus millei include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules.
